comments: The last Friday Rock Show presented by Tommy Vance. Claire Sturgess also gets involved in co-presenting it with Tommy Vance, as she takes over from him on the next show.
The only version of this show currently shared is from the Team Rock Radio re-broadcast of 2013. The competition elements were removed and Little Angel session tracks replaced by the LP versions.
The MediaFire download includes 3 of the actual Little Angels session tracks (not the album versions)
